model.note: Raw pretrained completion (no instruction tuning, no chat template available on the model).

interpretation.context: IFEval measures verifiable instruction following (e.g. 'reply in 3 paragraphs', 'include the word X exactly twice'). Numbers below are completion-style (no chat template).
interpretation.verdict: King performs in the same range as a strong 7-8B base model. As expected for the Teutonic-VIII protocol (from-scratch pretraining, no instruction tune), it is not competitive with instruction-tuned chat models on IFEval (e.g. Llama-3-8B-Instruct ~0.74 prompt_loose).
